'''zhalufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldest|oldest]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldest|oldest]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhalufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhælifith|zhælifith]] || [[word:zhælifij|zhælifij]] || [[word:zhælifish|zhælifish]] || [[word:zhælifi|zhælifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhalulufuth|zhalulufuth]] || [[word:zhalulufuj|zhalulufuj]] || [[word:zhalulufush|zhalulufush]] || [[word:zhalulufu|zhalulufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhalufuth|zhalufuth]] || [[word:zhalufuj|zhalufuj]] || [[word:zhalufush|zhalufush]] || [[word:zhalufu|zhalufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhaluffuth|zhaluffuth]] || [[word:zhaluffuj|zhaluffuj]] || [[word:zhaluffush|zhaluffush]] || [[word:zhaluffuf|zhaluffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhalufuthu|zhalufuthu]] || [[word:zhalufuju|zhalufuju]] || [[word:zhalufushu|zhalufushu]] || [[word:zhalufuku|zhalufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhalufuth|zhalufuth]] || [[word:zhalufuj|zhalufuj]] || [[word:zhalufush|zhalufush]] || [[word:zhalufu|zhalufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhalufuthul|zhalufuthul]] || [[word:zhalufujul|zhalufujul]] || [[word:zhalufushul|zhalufushul]] || [[word:zhalufukul|zhalufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhalufuthuthu|zhalufuthuthu]] || [[word:zhalufujuju|zhalufujuju]] || [[word:zhalufushushu|zhalufushushu]] || [[word:zhalufuku|zhalufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhalufuthun|zhalufuthun]] || [[word:zhalufujun|zhalufujun]] || [[word:zhalufushun|zhalufushun]] || [[word:zhalufukun|zhalufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhalufuthuoro|zhalufuthuoro]] || [[word:zhalufujuoro|zhalufujuoro]] || [[word:zhalufushuoro|zhalufushuoro]] || [[word:zhalufukuoro|zhalufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
